title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Evergreen India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Evergreen India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Fleet Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
